content_body: We had an awesome time spending our week long vacation here at Serendipity - all 7 of us.  My kids taught their grandmother how to play pool - many evenings out by the fire in the "treehouse" just to visit with eachother.  Such a treat to spend time with the ones you love.  We visited Ruby Falls- INCREDIBLE - the kids will always remember the waterfall!  Spent an afternoon tubing - such a great family adventure - and very organized - pink tubes.  We had a friend loan his boat to us for a few days and enjoyed several trips out on Lake Blue Ridge - caught 5 bass - and cooked them for dinner.  We didn't eat out, only because I think we have the top two chefs in our crew - my husband and my mom!  We did buy some great fudge up at Lookout Mountain.  Thank you for opening your home up to us - it was so very welcoming and cozy.
title: Family Retreat in North Georgia
